Look, I’ve seen a BUNCH of 1 star reviews stating that the mods and the owner are abusing their power and kicking/banning people. I’m just writing this review to say that this game is going to lose a lot of players if this goes on. I mean, why would you make a game for everyone to play if you don’t let anyone play at all? Just saying, I think the creators of this game should make better choices. Also, if the creators  is being such a hypocrite and banning people for the stuff that they did themself, the then this great game deserves someone else.

This game has huge potential to be one of the best vr games! At the moment of writing this, there is no ending to level 7 and me and my friends and I had a blast! Awesome game! There are some bugs here and there, but the ragdoll is so funny with friends! Def staying till the next update
